reviews.review_description: I have been trying to make this app. to work without success. It doesn't have instructions on how to use the controls... All you can do is looking at a still picture. I am super disappointed.

reviews.review_title: I can’t get this app to work.
reviews.review_description: I get a static image, but no video. There are no instructions about controller use. Bummer.

For the price which is less than 50 cents an image, these are high quality VR 360 non 3D images that have a nostalgic vibe. The future apocalypse scenes scared me in a good way. It was exhilarating. Worth the money. Enjoy immersing yourself in history. Excellent app. Would recommend. Stately artistic images.
This app is best used standing as it is a long road that has no turning. Neither does this app.

👉webnetka*com 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 metaquest*forumactif*com👈
❌ this is a drawn image (using 3D rendering software probably) so it's more illustrative than photo realistic
❌ these are 360 environments but not 3D at all
❌ each environment requires a significant, even painful loading time
❌ and what displeases me a lot: no action is possible with the controllers: neither moving, nor even turning on oneself

✔️ some images are neat (but some still have very little interest)
✔️ sound atmosphere present (but not insane either)
✔️ 9 categories with 1-5 images for each

In the end I have the impression of having paid for about thirty images which have nothing extraordinary and not even relief, and which I will never re-watch (or even show to someone in VR demonstration). Difficult to advise therefore, especially for paid
Quick uninstall...

==================================
Pour échanger vos expériences et vos avis:
 👉 metaquest*forumactif*com 👈
Pour les promos quest : 👉 webnetka*com 👈

reviews.review_title: Unique way to see incredible places
reviews.review_description: This is fun to jump from parts of History to even battles and places of wonder. I love the sounds that were added to each scene. Thank you
